models.title: Kritical · OpenRouter /free (unlimited free frontier models)
models.systemMessage: You are a helpful coding assistant. Prefer concise answers with code diffs. Never invent APIs.

models.title: Kritical · Gemini 2.5 Flash (Google AI Studio free tier)

customCommands.name: explain
customCommands.prompt: Explain the highlighted code in plain English. Structure: (1) what it does, (2) what it depends on, (3) what breaks if misused.

customCommands.name: free-refactor
customCommands.prompt: Refactor the highlighted code following best practices. Never introduce new abstractions unless they save at least 3 duplicate patterns.

customCommands.name: free-review
customCommands.prompt: Review the CURRENT git diff. Check for: secrets leakage, logic errors, test coverage gaps, performance issues. Be specific with line references.
